rationale: The cited paper appears only as part of a grouped citation in the theory section to support a general claim that perceived risk affects consumer information processing. The citing article does not discuss this paper's specific findings, methods, or constructs (e.g., returns/CLV/resource allocation), nor does it build any hypothesis or empirical design directly on it. Because the reference functions as broad background support without a distinct role for this specific source, the citation is mention-only.
